_comment: Known affiliate programs for InvestedLuxury verticals. Commission/AOV figures are estimates from public network listings and industry sources — verify inside each network before applying. Updated manually; last review 2026-06. Skimlinks/aggregators permanently excluded per April 2026 decision. Networks allowed: AWIN, CJ, Rakuten, Sovrn, Partnerize, direct in-house programs.

programs.name: Eight Sleep
programs.notes: Pod mattress covers $2,850-$5,100. Highest-revenue wellness anchor. Strong brand fit for longevity vertical.

programs.name: Sunlighten
programs.notes: Infrared saunas $5K-$10K+. Anchor for Best Home Sauna 2026 pillar. Long consideration cycle, generous cookie typical.

programs.name: Clearlight Saunas
programs.notes: Direct program. Competes with Sunlighten for sauna cluster monetization.

programs.name: Plunge
programs.notes: Cold plunge tubs $3K-$8K. Direct fit for cold-plunge-benefits keyword cluster (527 keywords in research).

programs.name: HigherDOSE
programs.notes: Infrared sauna blankets, red light masks. Lower AOV but high volume; passes $50 threshold.

programs.name: Therabody
programs.notes: BELOW $50 THRESHOLD at typical AOV. Only worth it for Theragun PRO bundles.

programs.name: NET-A-PORTER
programs.notes: ALREADY PENDING. Unlocks Margaux monetization + NAP link fixes across articles.

programs.name: MATCHES
programs.notes: Borderline on $50 threshold. Strong The Row / Toteme / quiet luxury inventory.

programs.name: Luisaviaroma
programs.notes: Strong EU luxury inventory, ships US. Good Loro Piana / Khaite coverage.

programs.name: 24S
programs.notes: LVMH-owned. Highest commission rate in luxury fashion. Carries Loro Piana, Celine, Dior.

programs.name: Nordstrom
programs.notes: BELOW $50 THRESHOLD. Low rate, short cookie. Skip unless strategic.

programs.name: TheRealReal
programs.notes: Resale authority. Already cited heavily in resale-value methodology articles — natural fit.

programs.name: Vestiaire Collective
programs.notes: Already cited in resale methodology. AWIN — existing network relationship.

programs.name: Fashionphile
programs.notes: Bags-focused resale. Featured in therealreal-vs-fashionphile comparison article already.

programs.name: Chrono24
programs.notes: Watch marketplace. High AOV compensates low rate. Fits Omega/TAG Heuer featured products.

programs.name: Blue Nile
programs.notes: Jewelry investment cluster fit (209 keywords). Existing CJ relationship.

programs.name: Brilliant Earth
programs.notes: Already a featured product on site (per audit). CJ — existing network.

programs.name: Monos
programs.notes: BELOW $50 THRESHOLD individually but carry-on+checked bundles pass. Luggage fits travel vertical.

programs.name: Virtuoso / Classic Vacations
programs.notes: NOT an affiliate program — advisor referral model. Listed to prevent repeated evaluation.
